package rulefixtures

// scenario for sort_slice_vs_sort_sort: `sort.Sort(sort.StringSlice(s))` or custom `sort.Interface` implementations for basic types
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario640Negative(values []string) string {
	if len(values) == 0 { return "" }
	best := values[0]
	for _, value := range values[1:] {
		if value < best { best = value }
	}
	return best
}
